heroStats.label: Arts GDP growth
heroStats.context: Real arts and cultural economic activity growth in 2023, compared with 2.9% real GDP growth for the broader U.S. economy.

heroStats.label: GDP contribution
heroStats.context: Arts and cultural economic activity accounted for 4.2% of U.S. GDP in 2023.

heroStats.label: Arts employment
heroStats.context: Arts and cultural employment nationwide in 2023.

heroStats.label: State arts funding
heroStats.context: Projected FY2026 decline in total state and jurisdictional arts agency appropriations.

charts.title: Arts sector growth compared with the broader U.S. economy
charts.description: Real 2023 growth: arts and cultural economic activity grew more than twice as fast as real GDP.

charts.title: State arts agency appropriations are projected to decline in FY2026
charts.description: NASAA's preliminary FY2026 preview shows total state and jurisdictional arts agency appropriations falling from roughly $704.2M to $650.2M.

charts.title: Private giving to arts, culture, and humanities recovered in 2024
charts.description: Giving USA reported inflation-adjusted giving to arts, culture, and humanities at $25.13B in 2024, an all-time high for the subsector.
